creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 226600
Patch file

Update databases/redis, databases/redis-devel and databases/redis5 to latest releases.

Release Notes: https://groups.google.com/g/redis-db/c/yU-jQ9BhL24/m/e6iZA2GLBgAJ
Security: CVE-2021-32761

Bug #257325 describes vulnerability fixed with this update. So please commit it together.
